title: Create: New Beginnings
description: Unique, vanilla+ structures added to villages and the world, featuring Create technology
body:
![Create: New Beginnings Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/498454ab71d1116a5ab5d5466b317a5a3524018c.png)
Now with Create 6.0.2 compatibility!

Enhance your Create experience with balanced, vanilla-style structures that reward exploring and puzzle solving, as well as demonstrate and intuitively teach Create's mechanics. With loot tables, unique village-specific structures, and some remnants of the past, enjoy the rewarding experience of exploring these new, Create-related structures.

**This mod requires Create**

This mod non-destructively adds structures to vanilla's villages, making it compatible with other mods that alter villages non-destructively.

This is an early version of the mod with plans for many structures and tweaks, including: dungeons, villager professions, lore, and more.

Porting to Fabric is planned, eventually.



As an initiative to support other mod authors, I'd like to share a couple mods that I feel do one specific thing very well. One is Exposure, a photography mod with a lot of charm. The other is The Comfort Zone, a mod that adds pillows to be used as a seat, break fall damage, or even harmless weapon!
